Muhsen Yasser
UI/UX Designer

I'm a UI/UX designer with 3+ years of experience building SaaS dashboards, fintech products, and multi-platform interfaces for Saudi and GCC market clients. I care about the details that most people skip.

I've been working at Mawjat Studio since 2024 — shipping products across event tech, fintech, real estate, and e-commerce. From Figma to live.

Right now I'm open for full-time roles and select collaborations. If you're building something that deserves to be executed well, let's talk.

You can find me on LinkedIn, check my work on Behance, or reach out via email.
